description:
Create a new saved reply named 'Password Reset Instructions' for the 'IT Support' mailbox in FreeScout. The body of the reply must contain the following content:

To reset your network password, please follow these steps:

1. Go to https://password.company.com
2. Click "Forgot Password" and enter your employee ID
3. You will receive a verification code on your registered mobile number
4. Enter the code and create a new password (minimum 12 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)
5. Your new password will sync across all systems within 15 minutes

If you continue to experience issues, please call the IT Help Desk at extension 4357.
